title: chonemorpha fragrans
intro: Chonemorpha fragrans, also known as the evening primrose vine or the fragrant chonemorpha, is a tropical evergreen vine native to Southeast Asia, known for its fragrant white flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chonemorpha fragrans include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
